lines.speaker: Harpert
lines.text: I guess this will be my last day of blood tithes, one way or another.

lines.speaker: Harpert
lines.text: It can't be that hard can it?

lines.speaker: Harpert
lines.text: I'm starting to think I made a mistake coming here.

lines.speaker: Harpert
lines.text: Can't talk. I need to prepare myself.

lines.speaker: Harpert
lines.text: I will survive the Theatre! Just like Serafina did!
